arts.ttl: Roma Set Sights on Inter’s Tajon Buchanan Amid Transfer Speculation
arts.sum: Inter Milan find themselves at the centre of transfer speculation as Roma express interest in acquiring Tajon Buchanan. The Canadian winger, who joined Inter from Club Brugge last year for €7.3 million, has become a notable target for the Giallorossi as they look to bolster their squad. The post Roma Set Sights on Inter’s Tajon Buchanan Amid Transfer Speculation appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Inter Milan Eye Gianluigi Donnarumma for Summer Transfer
arts.sum: Inter Milan are reportedly keeping a close watch on Gianluigi Donnarumma, the former Rossoneri goalkeeper currently playing for Paris Saint-Germain, as they prepare for the upcoming summer transfer window. The post Inter Milan Eye Gianluigi Donnarumma for Summer Transfer appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Inter Milan’s Bisseck Faces Extended Absence Due to Injury
arts.sum: Inter Milan has suffered another setback in defence with the news that Yann Bisseck has sustained a muscle injury. The young German defender underwent medical examinations that revealed a muscular strain in the adductor muscles of his left thigh. As a result, he is expected to be sidelined for approximately 20 to 25 days. The post Inter Milan’s Bisseck Faces Extended Absence Due to Injury appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Inter Milan Coach and Midfielder Questioned in Ultras Investigation
arts.sum: In a recent development in the ongoing investigation into Inter Milan's ultras, both head coach Simone Inzaghi and midfielder Hakan Calhanoglu have been questioned about their interactions with key figures of the Curva Nord, some of whom were arrested last September on charges of criminal association aggravated by mafia methods. The post Inter Milan Coach and Midfielder Questioned in Ultras Investigation appeared first on FootItalia.com.
